texto: She hadn't expected this. "Are you not angry?""Yes, very much so.""Do you not require some time to think about what I've told you?""Yes, I do. But you do not have to leave. There is much for me to come to terms with, mana mila, but I do not wish to be away from you anymore. Even when I am angry.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de C.J. Markusfeld que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “She hadn't expected this. "Are you not angry?""Yes, very much so.""Do you not require some time t…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, appreciation, intense, com foco em intense e love.
